name: Read events
description: Read events from a data product via the Loxtep SDK. Uses LoxtepClient.data_products.get_reader(data_product_name) which resolves queue, bot, and bus config automatically.

data_product_name.description: Name or UUID of the source data product. The SDK resolves the input queue, bot ID, and bus config automatically from this.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to read per batch.
